title: CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION - 211info
text: CENTER FOR HUMAN DEVELOPMENT CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Crisis line offers a range of crisis services and interventions including screening assessment, triage and intervention. 2301 Cove Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 962-8800 6 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 962-8800 ext 6 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for crisis services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Union County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8-5:30pm Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL AND DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR HUMAN DEVELOPMENT
